evals.name: eval-core-bug-p0
evals.prompt: Triage open issue #101 in open_issues.json against roadmap.md. Determine priority label (priority/critical-urgent to priority/awaiting-more-evidence) and Kanban Priority (P0-P4).
evals.expected_output: Issue #101 assigned priority/critical-urgent (P0) due to resource leak / data integrity in core controller.
assertions: Rationale cites core controller bug, data integrity, or resource leak

evals.name: eval-roadmap-inheritance-p1-p2
evals.prompt: Triage open issues #201 and #202 in open_issues.json against roadmap.md. Determine priority labels and Kanban Priority based on roadmap status.
evals.expected_output: Issue #201 assigned priority/important-soon (P1) for In Progress item; Issue #202 assigned priority/important-longterm (P2) for Planned item.
assertions: Rationale references roadmap status (In Progress vs Planned)

evals.name: eval-honor-existing-label-p1
evals.prompt: Triage open issue #301 in open_issues.json which already has label priority/important-soon.
evals.expected_output: Issue #301 retains priority/important-soon (P1) with a note that existing label was honored.
assertions: Output notes that existing priority label was preserved/honored

evals.name: eval-low-signal-and-backlog-p3-p4
evals.prompt: Triage open issues #401 (cleanup refactor) and #501 (empty body / triage/needs-information).
evals.expected_output: Issue #401 assigned priority/backlog (P3); Issue #501 assigned priority/awaiting-more-evidence (P4).

evals.name: eval-security-vulnerability-p0
evals.prompt: Triage open issue #601 (critical security vulnerability / CVE).
evals.expected_output: Issue #601 assigned priority/critical-urgent (P0) for critical security vulnerability.
assertions: Rationale cites security or dependency vulnerability

evals.name: eval-full-suite-report-completeness
evals.prompt: Run full triage on open_issues.json against roadmap.md and write issue-triage-report.md.
evals.expected_output: A complete issue-triage-report.md grouping all 7 open issues by priority tier (P0-P4) with roadmap mapping and second-look section.
assertions: The report contains all 7 open issues (#101, #201, #202, #301, #401, #501, #601)
Issues are grouped by priority tier from P0 to P4
The report includes a second look or judgment calls section
